# freeSeva

freeSeva is a free, privacy-first digital services platform. Its first available service is Document Tools for preparing photos, signatures and PDFs for online forms, exam portals, job portals and government applications.

Important pages:
- https://freeseva.vercel.app/ - FreeSeva homepage and mission
- https://freeseva.vercel.app/document-tools - Document Tools overview
- https://freeseva.vercel.app/image-compressor - Compress JPG, PNG and WEBP images to exact KB limits
- https://freeseva.vercel.app/pdf-compressor - Compress PDFs to 100KB, 200KB, 300KB or custom sizes
- https://freeseva.vercel.app/signature-compressor - Compress signatures to 10KB, 20KB or custom limits
- https://freeseva.vercel.app/image-to-pdf - Convert images to a single PDF
- https://freeseva.vercel.app/image-resizer - Resize images by pixels, cm or mm
- https://freeseva.vercel.app/pdf-merge - Merge multiple PDF files
- https://freeseva.vercel.app/pdf-split - Split PDF pages or page ranges
- https://freeseva.vercel.app/white-background - Replace photo background with white
- https://freeseva.vercel.app/form-helper - Prepare photos, signatures and PDFs together

Privacy:
Files are processed locally in the user's browser. No login is required for the utility tools.

Contact:
Developed by Aryan Gupta - https://www.linkedin.com/in/imaryan02/
